name: Hiranaka Sukiyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in vegetable oil.
2. Add soy sauce, MSG, stock, and sugar to the pan. Allow the mixture to cook for about 2 minutes.
3. Add onions and celery, and let them cook for a couple of more minutes.
4. Incorporate mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and green onion tops into the pan. Cook for three to five minutes.
5. Push the food to one side of the pan and add shirataki noodles. Let them absorb some of the juice.
6. Add watercress and cook for an additional minute.
7. Stir well and serve with rice.
